how.commands: Comandos: {commandPrefix}sr artista - cancion; {commandPrefix}sr artista *random; {commandPrefix}sr artista *choice; {commandPrefix}vip; {commandPrefix}vip artista - cancion; {commandPrefix}edit #2 artista - cancion; {commandPrefix}remove reg|vip|all; {commandPrefix}position.
